message:
Transform viewer UI to modern Gmail-style interface with dark mode and Alpine.js This commit represents a complete redesign of the static viewer interface, transforming it from a minimal three-pane layout into a modern, feature-rich Gmail-style email client with dark mode, split-pane viewing, fullscreen mode, and reactive state management via Alpine.js. The UI is now responsive, polished, and provides a significantly improved user experience. ⚠️ SECURITY NOTE: This commit relaxes the Content Security Policy to enable CDN resources (Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js, Lucide icons, Google Fonts). While this improves UX significantly, it introduces external dependencies and 'unsafe-inline' script execution. This tradeoff prioritizes modern UX over maximum CSP strictness. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Overview: From Minimal to Modern ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ File Statistics: ---------------- +438 lines added -174 lines removed Total: 468 lines (was 204 lines) Net growth: +264 lines (129% increase) Visual Transformation: ---------------------- BEFORE (Simple Three-Pane): ``` ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ MCP Agent Mail: Static Viewer │ │ [Cache] [Diagnostics] │ ├────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Projects | Attachments | Scrubbing Summary │ ├──────────┬─────────────┬─────────────────────┤ │ Threads │ Messages │ Message Detail │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ │ └──────────┴─────────────┴─────────────────────┘ ``` AFTER (Gmail-Style): ``` ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ 🌙 Agent Mail 3 projects [☀️] [💾] [📊] [⛶] │ ├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ [🔍 Search all messages...] [📥 Inbox] [💬 Threads] │ ├───────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┤ │ 📬 42 messages ▼ │ │ │ │ ✉️ Message Detail │ │ ● Alice │ │ │ Let's deploy... │ From: Alice │ │ │ 2 hours ago │ │ ● Bob │ │ │ Check the logs │ Markdown content rendered here │ │ │ with syntax highlighting │ │ ● Carol │ │ │ Looks good! │ │ └───────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┘ ``` ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Major Feature Additions ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 1. Modern UI Framework Stack ============================= Added External Dependencies [lines 33-86]: ------------------------------------------- **Tailwind CSS v3** (CDN): ```html ``` Why Tailwind: - Utility-first CSS framework - Rapid prototyping and styling - Consistent design system - Built-in responsive utilities - Dark mode support out of the box - No build step required (CDN version) Custom Tailwind Configuration [lines 35-77]: ```javascript tailwind.config = { darkMode: 'class', // Enable class-based dark mode theme: { extend: { fontFamily: { sans: ['Inter', 'system-ui', '-apple-system', 'sans-serif'], }, colors: { primary: { 50: '#eef2ff', 100: '#e0e7ff', // ... full color palette 500: '#6366f1', // Main brand color (indigo) }, }, animation: { 'fade-in': 'fadeIn 0.2s ease-in-out', 'slide-in': 'slideIn 0.3s ease-out', }, }, }, } ``` **Alpine.js v3** (CDN): ```html ``` Why Alpine: - Lightweight (~15kb min+gzip) - Vue-like reactive syntax in HTML - No build step required - Perfect for progressive enhancement - Handles all UI state management - x-data, x-show, x-if, x-for directives **Lucide Icons** (CDN): ```html ``` Why Lucide: - Beautiful, consistent icon set - 1000+ icons available - SVG-based (crisp at any size) - Accessible - Easy to use: `` **Google Fonts - Inter** [lines 12-15]: ```html ``` Why Inter: - Modern, readable sans-serif font - Optimized for UI text - Variable font weights (300-800) - Excellent on screens - Professional appearance 2. Dark Mode Support ===================== Dark Mode Implementation [lines 17-30, line 2]: ------------------------------------------------ **HTML Root Attribute**: ```html ``` How it works: - `x-data="darkModeController()"`: Alpine state for dark mode - `:class="{ 'dark': darkMode }"`: Conditionally apply 'dark' class - `x-cloak`: Prevent flash of unstyled content **FOUC Prevention Script** [lines 17-30]: ```javascript (function () { try { const stored = localStorage.getItem('darkMode'); const prefers = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches; if (stored === 'true' || (stored === null && prefers)) { document.documentElement.classList.add('dark'); } else { document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark'); } } catch (error) { document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark'); } })(); ``` Why this script: - Runs BEFORE Alpine loads (prevents flash) - Checks localStorage first (user preference) - Falls back to system preference (prefers-color-scheme) - Defaults to light mode on error **Dark Mode Behavior**: - Initial load: Checks localStorage → system preference → light - Persists across sessions - Respects system theme if not manually set - Toggle via button in navbar **Dark Mode Styling**: Every element styled with dark variants: ```html
``` Tailwind's dark: modifier automatically applies when 'dark' class is on 3. Gmail-Style Split Pane Interface ==================================== **Top Navigation Bar** [lines 107-135]: ---------------------------------------- Features: - Logo with mail icon - Project count badge - Dark mode toggle (moon/sun icon) - Cache status button - Diagnostics toggle - Sticky positioning (stays visible on scroll) **Search Bar** [lines 140-166]: -------------------------------- Gmail-inspired search: ```html
``` Features: - Icon inside input (left side) - Real-time filtering (x-model + @input) - Escape key to clear (keyboard accessible) - Clear button appears when typing - Focus ring animation - Rounded corners (modern aesthetic) **View Mode Toggle** [lines 168-181]: -------------------------------------- Switch between inbox and thread views: ```html
``` Active state: - Selected button has white background + shadow - Inactive buttons are transparent - Smooth transitions **Fullscreen Mode** [lines 183-189]: ------------------------------------- Toggle button to maximize viewing area: ```html ``` When fullscreen: - Backdrop overlay dims page - Message list expands to full viewport - Z-index raised above everything - Click backdrop to exit - Icons swap (maximize ↔ minimize) **Message List Pane** [lines 213-291]: --------------------------------------- Gmail-style message list: List Header [lines 219-238]: ```html
``` Features: - Message count display - Sort dropdown (newest/oldest/sender) - Click outside to close dropdown - Alpine @click.outside directive Message List Items [lines 248-279]: ```html ``` Features: - Avatar with first letter of sender - Gradient background for avatars - Sender name + timestamp - Subject line (bold) - Project slug (subtle) - Selected state (blue background + left border) - Hover effect - Truncation for long text - Only renders first 100 messages (performance) **Message Detail Pane** [lines 293-332]: ----------------------------------------- Right side shows selected message: ```html
``` Features: - Large subject heading - Sender avatar + name + timestamp - Markdown rendering with Marked.js + DOMPurify - Prose typography styles (tailwindcss/typography) - Empty state when no message selected - Max-width for readability - Scrollable independently from list 4. Thread View ============== **Thread List** [lines 337-413]: --------------------------------- Alternative view showing conversation threads: Thread Header [lines 343-353]: ```html

``` Thread Messages [lines 356-404]: ```html ``` Features: - Accordion-style expandable messages - Last message auto-expanded (Gmail behavior) - Preview snippet when collapsed - Chevron rotates when expanded - Smooth transitions (x-transition) - Click anywhere to expand/collapse - Markdown rendering in body 5. Collapsible Diagnostics Panel ================================= **Diagnostics Moved to Dropdown** [lines 193-210]: --------------------------------------------------- ```html

Database

Source:
Messages:
FTS5:

Cache

State:
Supported:

Bundle

Generated:
Schema:
``` Changes: - Modal → collapsible panel under navbar - Three-column grid layout - Smooth slide-down animation - Toggle button in navbar - More compact, less intrusive - Still shows all key information 6. Responsive Design ==================== **Mobile-First Breakpoints**: ```html
Fullscreen ``` Tailwind breakpoints: - Default (mobile): Single column, full width - md (768px+): Two columns, split panes - lg (1024px+): Three columns, optimal spacing **Mobile Optimizations**: - Touch-friendly tap targets (min 44px) - Larger avatars - Compact spacing on mobile - Hidden labels on small screens - Vertical stacking on narrow viewports 7. Loading States and Animations ================================= **Loading Spinner** [lines 434-440]: ------------------------------------- ```html

Loading mailbox...

``` Simple, elegant spinner while database loads. **Transition Animations**: Fade-in for panels: ```html x-transition:enter="transition ease-out duration-200" x-transition:enter-start="opacity-0" x-transition:enter-end="opacity-100" ``` Slide-down for dropdowns: ```html x-transition:enter-start="opacity-0 -translate-y-2" x-transition:enter-end="opacity-100 translate-y-0" ``` Tailwind animations [lines 60-71]: ```javascript animation: { 'fade-in': 'fadeIn 0.2s ease-in-out', 'slide-in': 'slideIn 0.3s ease-out', }, keyframes: { fadeIn: { '0%': { opacity: '0' }, '100%': { opacity: '1' }, }, slideIn: { '0%': { transform: 'translateX(-10px)', opacity: '0' }, '100%': { transform: 'translateX(0)', opacity: '1' }, }, }, ``` **Empty States**: Inbox empty: ```html

No messages found

``` No message selected: ```html

Select a message to view

``` Large icons + descriptive text = clear user feedback 8. Markdown Rendering ===================== **Prose Styling** [lines 89-102]: ---------------------------------- ```css .prose { max-width: 65ch; } .prose p { margin-top: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 1.25em; } .prose h1 { font-size: 2.25em; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.8888889em; } .prose h2 { font-size: 1.5em; margin-top: 2em; margin-bottom: 1em; } .prose code { font-size: 0.875em; } .prose pre { font-size: 0.875em; line-height: 1.7142857; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.8571429em 1.1428571em; overflow-x: auto; } .prose ul { margin-top: 1.25em; padding-left: 1.625em; } .prose blockquote { font-style: italic; border-left-width: 0.25rem; padding-left: 1em; } ``` Tailwind Typography-inspired styles for readable content: - Optimal line length (65 characters) - Comfortable spacing - Styled code blocks - Blockquote styling - List indentation Usage in message bodies: ```html
``` - `prose`: Base typography styles - `prose-slate`: Slate color scheme - `dark:prose-invert`: Dark mode color inversion - `max-w-none`: Allow full width (override 65ch default) ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Content Security Policy Changes ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ⚠️ CRITICAL SECURITY CHANGE Old CSP (Strict) [commit 19c099d]: ----------------------------------- ```html content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; require-trusted-types-for 'script'; trusted-types mailViewerDOMPurify dompurify default;" ``` New CSP (Relaxed) [this commit]: --------------------------------- ```html content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; require-trusted-types-for 'script'; trusted-types mailViewerDOMPurify dompurify default;" ``` Key Changes: ------------ **script-src**: Added external CDNs + 'unsafe-inline' - 'unsafe-inline': Required for inline ``` This ensures CDN files haven't been tampered with. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Browser Compatibility and Requirements ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Required Browser Features: --------------------------- 1. **CSS Grid + Flexbox**: - Chrome 57+ / Firefox 52+ / Safari 10.1+ / Edge 16+ - Needed for: Layout system 2. **CSS Custom Properties (Variables)**: - Chrome 49+ / Firefox 31+ / Safari 9.1+ / Edge 15+ - Needed for: Tailwind dynamic colors 3. **ES6+ JavaScript**: - Chrome 51+ / Firefox 54+ / Safari 10+ / Edge 15+ - Needed for: Alpine.js, const, let, arrow functions 4. **localStorage**: - All modern browsers - Needed for: Dark mode persistence 5. **matchMedia (prefers-color-scheme)**: - Chrome 76+ / Firefox 67+ / Safari 12.1+ / Edge 79+ - Needed for: System dark mode detection 6. **Trusted Types** (Optional Enhancement): - Chrome 83+ / Edge 83+ - Gracefully degrades in unsupported browsers Minimum Supported: ------------------ - Chrome 76+ (July 2019) - Firefox 67+ (May 2019) - Safari 12.1+ (March 2019) - Edge 79+ (January 2020) Legacy IE11: NOT SUPPORTED - No CSS Grid - No ES6 - No Trusted Types - Viewer will fail completely ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Performance Considerations ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ **Asset Loading**: Total External Resources: 1. Tailwind CSS (~80KB compressed) 2. Alpine.js (~15KB compressed) 3. Lucide icons (~5KB compressed) 4. Google Fonts - Inter (~20KB compressed) 5. Marked.js (local vendor) (~20KB) 6. DOMPurify (local vendor) (~20KB) 7. Clusterize.js (local vendor) (~5KB) Total: ~165KB external + ~45KB local = ~210KB **Loading Strategy**: Blocking resources: - Tailwind CSS: Blocks render (needed for layout) - Dark mode script: Blocks render (prevents FOUC) Non-blocking: - Alpine.js: defer attribute (loads after DOM) - Lucide: Loads after Alpine - Fonts: font-display: swap (fallback shown immediately) **Render Performance**: Message list virtualization: ```html
